div.head: The Secretary of State to the Minister in China (MacMurray)
div.p: 343. Your despatch 1614, August 15. Referring to last paragraph the Department authorizes you singly or jointly with interested colleagues to file general notification of outstanding obligations of China to American citizens in general accord with the memorandum enclosed with the Legation’s despatch of March 25, 1926.Despatch not printed. For text of its enclosure, see memorandum of Mar. 18, 1926, from the American, British, French, and Japanese Ministers to the Chinese Ministry of Foreign Affairs, Foreign Relations, 1926, vol. i, p. 947.
